breakdown: PR adds robust numeric extraction to rewards_box normalization with a centralized `_DNC.convert_value` and fallback key lists. The `_get_raw` helper elegantly handles edge cases (empty strings, zero, NaN, inf). Test coverage is strong with both unit and E2E hallucination tests. Type safety is moderate due to `Any` return type in helper and runtime type assertions in tests.
key_changes: Add `_get_raw` helper function with fallback key list and edge case handling (empty, zero, NaN, inf)
Use centralized `_DNC.convert_value` for robust numeric extraction with multiple key fallbacks
Simplify chaining by removing explicit coerce_int calls in favor of centralized conversion
Add `RewardsBoxRobustnessTest` E2E test with internal unit tests and hallucination provocation
Add comment explaining WHY non-standard boolean representations need wider truthiness check
